summary: Completed testing of Student Progress Dashboard feature. All backend API tests (11/11 passed) and frontend UI tests passed. The dashboard correctly displays student adaptive learning progress including lessons completed, time spent, streak, achievements, and per-subject progress.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/adaptive-learning/dashboard/{student_id} - returns 200 for valid student
Backend: Dashboard returns correct student info (student_id, name)
Backend: Dashboard returns progress data with correct structure (total_lessons_completed, total_time_spent, current_streak, achievements)
Backend: Dashboard subjects array has correct structure (subject, current_level, completed_lessons, total_lessons, time_spent)
Backend: Dashboard achievements array has correct structure (title, earned_at)
Backend: Dashboard returns 404 for invalid student ID
Backend: Dashboard requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Time calculation is correct (15 min per lesson)
Backend: Recent activity is returned with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/students returns list of students
Backend: Students list contains test student Maria Garcia
Frontend: Student Progress page loads at /student-progress
Frontend: Page title 'Progreso del Estudiante' displayed
Frontend: Student selector dropdown works (data-testid='student-progress-selector')
Frontend: Download Report button present and enabled (data-testid='download-progress-report')
Frontend: Stats cards display: 1 Lesson Completed, 15 min Time, 1 Day Streak, 1 Achievement
Frontend: Subject progress shows Mathematics at Level 1 with 17% completion (1/6 lessons)
Frontend: Achievements section shows 'First Lesson' achievement
Frontend: Recent Activity shows completed lesson 'Counting and Number Recognition (1-10)'
Frontend: Navigation link 'Progreso Estudiante' appears in sidebar with NEW badge
Frontend: 'View Progress' button on Adaptive Learning page navigates to dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard correctly aggregates data from adaptive_learning_progress and adaptive_learning_paths collections
Time calculation uses 15 min per completed lesson as expected
Achievements are dynamically generated based on milestones (1 lesson, 5 lessons, 10 lessons, multi-subject, level up)
PDF report opens in new browser window with print-ready HTML - uses browser's native print dialog
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_student_progress_dashboard.py - Created comprehensive test suite for dashboard endpoint

test_credentials.test_student: student_40da2916 (Maria Garcia) - has 1 completed lesson in math

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iteration. Maria Garcia has 1 completed math lesson.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student Progress Dashboard feature is fully working. Backend endpoint GET /api/adaptive-learning/dashboard/{student_id} returns comprehensive progress data. Frontend displays stats cards, per-subject progress with level and completion rate, achievements, and recent activity. PDF download opens new window with print-ready HTML.

dashboard_endpoint.details: Returns comprehensive progress data including student info, subjects, total lessons, time spent, streak, achievements, and recent activity

student_selector.details: Dropdown shows available students, selecting changes displayed data

download_report.details: Opens new browser window with print-ready HTML for PDF generation

stats_display.details: Shows 4 stat cards: Lessons Completed, Time Spent, Day Streak, Achievements

subject_progress.details: Shows per-subject progress with level, completion rate, completed/remaining lessons, and time

achievements_section.details: Displays earned achievements based on milestones

recent_activity.details: Shows recently completed lessons with subject and date

navigation_link.details: Student Progress link appears in sidebar with NEW badge

view_progress_button.details: Button on Adaptive Learning page navigates to Student Progress dashboard
